entity.label: Rhesa
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Affection, son of Zorobabel, mentioned in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:27).

nodes.label: Rhesa
nodes.description: Affection, son of Zorobabel, mentioned in the genealogy of our Lord (Luke 3:27).

nodes.label: Joanna
nodes.description: The grandson of Zerubbabel, in the lineage of Christ (Luke 3:27); the same as Hananiah (1 Chr. 3:19).

verses.text: Which was the son of Joanna, which was the son of Rhesa, which was the son of Zorobabel, which was the son of Salathiel, which was the son of Neri,
